narrative:
North Canton 3-B (precinct in Stark County) has 1,207 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
